sentences.target: Ça m'affecte plus que tu crois.

translations.fr: Ça m'affecte plus que tu crois.
translations.en: It affects me more than you think.
translations.es: Me afecta más de lo que crees.
translations.de: Es trifft mich mehr, als du denkst.
translations.it: Mi colpisce più di quanto pensi.
translations.ko: 그건 네가 생각하는 것보다 나에게 더 큰 영향을 미쳐.
translations.zh-Hans: 这对我的影响比你想的更大。
translations.yue: 呢件事對我嘅影響比你諗嘅更大。
translations.ru: Это влияет на меня сильнее, чем ты думаешь.
translations.pt: Isso me afeta mais do que você pensa.
translations.he: זה משפיע עליי יותר ממה שאתה חושב.
translations.tr: Bu beni düşündüğünden daha çok etkiliyor.
translations.vi: Điều đó ảnh hưởng đến tôi nhiều hơn bạn nghĩ.
translations.ar: هذا يؤثر عليّ أكثر مما تظن.
translations.nl: Het raakt me meer dan je denkt.
translations.uk: Це впливає на мене більше, ніж ти думаєш.
translations.hu: Ez jobban hat rám, mint gondolod.
translations.hi: यह मुझे जितना तुम सोचते हो उससे ज्यादा प्रभावित करता है।
translations.pl: To wpływa na mnie bardziej, niż myślisz.
translations.el: Αυτό με επηρεάζει περισσότερο απ' όσο νομίζεις.
translations.nb: Det påvirker meg mer enn du tror.
translations.id: Itu memengaruhi saya lebih dari yang kamu kira.
translations.sv: Det påverkar mig mer än du tror.
translations.ro: Mă afectează mai mult decât crezi.
translations.cs: Ovlivňuje mě to víc, než si myslíš.
translations.da: Det påvirker mig mere, end du tror.
translations.fi: Se vaikuttaa minuun enemmän kuin luulet.
translations.ja: それはあなたが思うよりも私に大きな影響を与えています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun used as the subject (3rd person singular, neutral).
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular). Clitic object pronoun m' (me, 1st person singular) is attached before the verb.
Comparative adverb modifying the degree of the verb; forms the comparative construction with que.
Subordinating conjunction introducing the comparative clause (plus que ...).
Personal subject pronoun (2nd person singular) for the subordinate clause.
Main verb in present indicative (2nd person singular) of the subordinate clause.

translations.es: Vamos a asignar a Paul a recepción.
translations.de: Wir setzen Paul am Empfang ein.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把保罗安排到前台。
translations.yue: 我哋會安排保羅去前台。
translations.ru: Мы назначаем Пола на стойку регистрации.
translations.pt: Estamos designando Paul para a recepção.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi phân công Paul ở quầy lễ tân.
translations.nl: We zetten Paul bij de receptie.
translations.uk: Ми призначаємо Пола на стійку реєстрації.
translations.hi: हम पॉल को रिसेप्शन पर नियुक्त कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami menugaskan Paul di bagian resepsionis.
translations.ro: Îl repartizăm pe Paul la recepție.
translations.ja: 私たちはポールを受付に配属します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject; agrees with 3rd person singular verb.
Transitive verb in present indicative (3rd person singular), here in the sense of assigning someone.
Proper noun functioning as the direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing the destination/assignment location.
Noun head with attached elided definite article l' (DET). The whole token is the object of the preposition à.

translations.zh-Hans: 这不影响这里的任何人。
translations.he: זה לא משפיע על אף אחד כאן.
translations.vi: Điều đó không ảnh hưởng đến ai ở đây.
translations.ar: هذا لا يؤثر على أي أحد هنا.
translations.uk: Це тут ні на кого не впливає.
translations.hi: यहाँ यह किसी को प्रभावित नहीं करता।
translations.pl: To tutaj na nikogo nie wpływa.
translations.id: Hal itu tidak memengaruhi siapa pun di sini.
translations.ro: Asta nu afectează pe nimeni aici.
translations.ja: ここでは誰にも影響しません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun used as the subject (3rd person singular, neutral).
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular) with attached clitic negative particle n' (ne), forming negation with personne.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the object; negative polarity item paired with ne (ne ... personne).
Adverb of place specifying location.

sentences.target: J'aimerais ne pas affecter tes plans.

translations.fr: J'aimerais ne pas affecter tes plans.
translations.en: I'd like not to affect your plans.
translations.de: Ich möchte deine Pläne nicht beeinflussen.
translations.it: Non vorrei influire sui tuoi piani.
translations.ko: 네 계획에 영향을 주고 싶지 않아.
translations.ru: Я бы не хотел влиять на твои планы.
translations.pt: Eu não gostaria de afetar os seus planos.
translations.he: הייתי מעדיף לא להשפיע על התוכניות שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn ảnh hưởng đến kế hoạch của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik wil je plannen niet beïnvloeden.
translations.uk: Я не хотів би впливати на твої плани.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारी योजनाओं पर असर नहीं डालना चाहता।
translations.pl: Nie chciałbym wpływać na twoje plany.
translations.el: Θα ήθελα να μην επηρεάσω τα σχέδιά σου.
translations.nb: Jeg vil helst ikke påvirke planene dine.
translations.sv: Jag vill helst inte påverka dina planer.
translations.ro: Nu aș vrea să îți afectez planurile.
translations.da: Jeg vil helst ikke påvirke dine planer.
translations.ja: あなたの予定に影響を与えたくありません。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in conditional present (1st person singular) expressing desire; attached subject clitic J' (je).
Clitic negation particle, the first part of ne ... pas.
Adverb completing the negation (pairs with ne).
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of J'aimerais (here negated by ne ... pas).
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular possessor), plural form agreeing with the noun plans.
Plural common noun functioning as the direct object of affecter.

jp: Ça m'affecte plus que tu crois.
J'aimerais ne pas affecter tes plans.
fr: Ça m'affecte plus que tu crois.
J'aimerais ne pas affecter tes plans.
en: It affects me more than you think.
I'd like not to affect your plans.
